summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected. No GitHub mutations, merges, fixes, labels, comments, or closes are planned. Hydrated open PRs are classified independently; refs missing from the compacted preflight artifact use non-mutating outcomes only.
